- API calls to integrate with a FHIR Server
    
- The Server name is passed in via variable.properties, while the objectType generally is passed in as a Header
    
- The FHIR token can be passed in using a variety of methods (the simplest is probably as Environment Variable fhir_token)
    
- This can be a good way to hide Credentials from Postman (and other test tools) and manage connections to your FHIR Server (by limiting connections to a single test account)
